title: Socrates x Noguchi Field Guide: Collections: Mixed-Media with Harumi Ori
description: Explore Socrates Sculpture Park with Educator Harumi Ori from The Noguchi Museum. In this collaborative partnership program with Field Guide at Socrates Sculpture Park, work with clay and collect found objects in the park to create mixed-media sculptures. Participants will consider how Isamu Noguchi combined materials in his abstract sculptures to express the forces of nature.
answerSummary: Socrates x Noguchi Field Guide: Collections: Mixed-Media with Harumi Ori is happening Saturday, July 18 at 11:00 AM at The Noguchi Museum in Long Island City, Queens. title: Members' Event: Curator-led Tour of Light and Stone: Revisiting Noguchi’s 1986 Venice Biennale
description: Marking the fortieth anniversary of Isamu Noguchi’s U.S. Pavilion in the 1986 Venice Biennale, Light and Stone examines one of the artist’s most provocative exhibitions through materials from The Noguchi Museum’s collection and archive. During the tour, guests will learn about how Noguchi challenged conventional distinctions between art, design, and environment.
answerSummary: Members' Event: Curator-led Tour of Light and Stone: Revisiting Noguchi’s 1986 Venice Biennale is happening Sunday, July 19 at 10:00 AM at The Noguchi Museum in Long Island City, Queens. title: Socrates x Noguchi Field Guide: Regeneration: Natural Materials with Julia Norton
description: Explore Socrates Sculpture Park with Educator Julia Norton from The Noguchi Museum. In this collaborative partnership program with Field Guide at Socrates Sculpture Park, explore the many possibilities of working with natural materials. Participants will engage with Isamu Noguchi’s ideas about preservation and sustainable practices by making artwork with found materials, natural pigments, and botanically dyed fabric.
answerSummary: Socrates x Noguchi Field Guide: Regeneration: Natural Materials with Julia Norton is happening Saturday, September 12 at 11:00 AM at The Noguchi Museum in Long Island City, Queens.
